models.name: deepseek-r1:7b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR REASONING (8GB VRAM): State-of-the-art reasoning model. Ideal for the 2nd stage of the hybrid system to refine descriptions and generate high-quality SEO keywords.

models.name: qwen2.5:7b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR GENERAL TASKS (16GB VRAM): Superior logic and knowledge. Excellent for general text processing and structured data generation.

models.name: aispin/qwen2.5-7b-instruct-abliterated-v2.q4_k_s.gguf:latest
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR CREATIVE FREEDOM (16GB VRAM): Special 'unfiltered' version of Qwen 2.5. Ideal for unrestricted creative tasks and artistic descriptions.

models.name: gemma4:e2b
models.description: EXPERIMENTAL (8GB VRAM): Latest April 2026 model from Google. High intelligence, but very demanding on VRAM. Use with all other apps closed.

models.name: gemma3:4b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR FAST ANALYTICS (8GB VRAM): Extremely fast and efficient vision model. Perfect for quick batch processing and initial image descriptions.

models.name: qwen3-vl:4b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR DESKTOP (8GB VRAM): Next-gen vision model. Significant improvement in spatial understanding and detailed object recognition.

models.name: glm-ocr:latest
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR OCR SPECIALIST (8GB VRAM): Specialist in extracting text from documents, labels, and complex images. Extremely fast and precise.

models.name: llama3.2-vision:11b
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR HIGH-END (16GB+ VRAM): Premium multimodal model from Meta. Best-in-class image reasoning for complex scenes.

models.name: moondream:latest
models.description: RECOMMENDED FOR LOW-END (CPU/Laptop): Ultra-lightweight vision model. Suitable for basic image tagging on hardware without dedicated GPU.
